publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2023-05-15 00:12:48 UTC.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.physdesc: Correspondence, press releases, film and television scripts, video tapes.
did.abstract: Correspondence, press releases and other information of Newton Deiter, coordinator of the Task Force; film and television scripts on which the Task Force worked; 3/4" video tapes of network television programs and source material.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: The Gay Media Task Force was created by the National Gay Task Force in 1972 to serve as a resource organization for network television programming as it addressed gay issues. The collection includes correspondence, press releases and other information about Newton Deiter, coordinator of the Task Force; film and television scripts on which the Task Force worked; erotica; and 3/4" video tapes of network television programs and source material.

label.ref: Series III. Film and television scripts

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Gay Media Task Force records, #7315. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

bioghist.head: Biographical / Historical
bioghist.p: The Gay Media Task Force was created by the National Gay Task Force in 1972 to serve as a resource organization for network programming dealing with gay issues.

userestrict.head: Conditions Governing Use
userestrict.p: Due to the fragility and potential degradation of moving image and sound recordings, viewing and listening is limited to items that have been digitized. If an item is in another media format, you may request to have the item digitized for access. Information on ordering access copies may be found on the Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections webpage. Audio visual material that has been digitized: V-5956.

did.unittitle: Newton Deiter articles, typescripts and manuscripts, published mostly in Insight
Series III. Film and television scripts

unittitle.title: James Dean: Portrait of a Friend
Dawn: Portrait of a Teenage Runaway
The Best Little Boy in the World
Washington, D.C., The Power and the Glory
Washington, D.C., The Power and the Glory
Washington, D.C., The Power and the Glory
The Life and Times of Captain Barney Miller
Sergeant Matlovich Versus the U.S. Air Force
Alexander: Portrait of a Teenaged Throwout

did.unittitle: Five scrapbooks of nude, erotic, and pornographic photographs and drawings
Alexander: The Other Side of Dawn - Part 1
Alexander: The Other Side of Dawn - Part 2
Alice - "Alice Gets a Pass", Phyllis - "Out of the Closet"
All in the Family - "Archie the Hero", Bob Crane Show - "A Case of Misdiagnosis"
Barney Miller - "Quarantine Part 1", Barney Miller - "Quarantine Part 2"
Boys for Sale or Fun and Games in Houston
C.P.O Sharkey - "Sharkey's Secret Life", NYPD - Episode Unknown
Carter Country - "Out of the Closet", Sanford Arms - "Phil's Assertion School"
Doctors' Hospital - "Watchman, Who Will Guard Thy Sleep?"
Gays: Private Feelings, Public Faces with Malcolm Boyd
Gimme A Break - "The Chief's Gay Evening"

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Digitized, use DVD-1063; includes Newt Deiter interviewing John Birggs about proposition 6 in California.

did.unittitle: Hot L Baltimore - "George and Gordon", All in the Family - "Judging Books by Covers"
KNBC Special - "Is School Out for Gays?"
Mary Hartman, Mary Hartman – Episode 127, Sirota's Court - "Court Fear"
Maude - "Arthur's Worry", The Nancy Walker Show - "A Matter of Principle"
Maude - "The Gay Bar", Chico and the Man - "The Dress"
Sergeant Matlovich vs. The U.S. Air Force Part 1
Sergeant Matlovich vs. The U.S. Air Force Part 2
Sidney Shorr: A Girl's Best Friend - Part 1
Sidney Shorr: A Girl's Best Friend - Part 2
Snip - "David Makes His Move" and "Out of the Closet"
Harry S. Truman: Plain Speaking (labeled as Speaking Frankly) - WQED
Starsky and Hutch - "Death in a Different Place"
Stockard Channing in Just Friends - "The Boy in the Band"
The Bob Newhart Show - "A Jackie Story"
The Bob Newhart Show - "Some of my Best Friends are...", The Practice - "Helen's Beau"
The Bold Ones: The New Doctors - "A Very Strange Triangle"
The Bold Ones: The New Doctors - Episode
The Streets of San Francisco - "A Good Cop, But..."
The Today Show - Gay Media Task Force

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contents are actually a ~15 minute tape with short porn scene followed by some minutes of "A Clockwork Orange" and a sports segment from news program.

did.unittitle: The White Shadow - "One of the Boys"
WKRP in Cincinnati - "Les on a Ledge"

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Sitcom - Last Resort - Episode Girlfriends, October 5, 1979, :30 Drama - Medical Center – Episode Impasse, October 1, 1973, 1:00 TV Movie - Death Scream – March 16, 1977, 1:30 – In two parts, part two the tape colors are off. Drama - The Bold Ones: The New Doctors – Episode A Very Strange Triangle, Original airdate October 31, 1972, This broadcast from March 9, 1976, 1:00
